name: Lisa's Spicy Asian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless chicken breasts, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken chunks with Thai seasoning and soy sauce to taste.
2. Heat oil in a pan, then stir-fry the chicken.
3. In a separate pot, cook the angel hair pasta using 3 parts water and 1 part chicken broth.
4. Drain the cooked pasta, add it to the pan with the chicken, sprinkle soy sauce over the top, and serve.
Very quick and easy dish that took less than 20 minutes to prepare, mostly deciding on the seasoning.
